Header.Name: triSpace - Pre-Create - Sets occupancy status to Vacant on new Space record creation

Task.Description: Update "Floor Cost per Sq Unit" on the Space/Space Group record with "Cost per Sq Unit" on the Floor record.

Task.TaskLabel: Call Location is Child of Update Parent Fields
Task.Description: Defect 122571 - Locator for parent floor is not working correctly in null state - using this WF to determine
Task.FilterBo: Location - Synchronous - Location Is Child Of Update Parent Fields

Task.TaskLabel: Call Pre-Create RPIM and Federal Tab Settings

triSpaceClassCurrent - Workflow - All Space Class Current
